rationale: Build directly on the current best columnwise `mlp.fc.weight` quantization path instead of spending another run on projection-EMA schedule tweaks. This keeps the winning axis change, but tunes the transposed MLP-expansion path itself with a dedicated clip percentile and a looser row-offset gate, so the largest still-int8 matrices get a quantizer matched to their new per-input-channel statistics during both late roundtrip training and final serialization.
title: Transpose-Tuned MLP Expansion Int8
